requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Gambia has no publicly confirmed national EV connector regulation. For an English-speaking IEC-oriented procurement, the practical direction is IEC 62196: Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC charging, especially where imported vehicles, donor projects, fleet tenders, or international charge-point operators specify IEC-family infrastructure. This requirement becomes mandatory when written into a TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, donor, site-owner, fleet, or tender specification.
summary.zh: 冈比亚尚无公开确认的国家电动汽车接口法规。对于英语环境下按IEC体系采购的项目，实际方向是IEC 62196：交流Type 2、直流CCS2，尤其是在进口车辆、捐助方项目、车队招标或国际充电点运营商指定IEC体系基础设施时。当TGSB、PURA、NAWEC、捐助方、场地方、车队或招标规格写明该要求时，即成为强制项目要求。
summary.zht: 甘比亞尚無公開確認的國家電動汽車接口法規。對於英語環境下按IEC體系採購的項目，實際方向是IEC 62196：交流Type 2、直流CCS2，尤其是在進口車輛、捐助方項目、車隊招標或國際充電點運營商指定IEC體系基礎設施時。當TGSB、PURA、NAWEC、捐助方、場地方、車隊或招標規格寫明該要求時，即成為強制項目要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Type 2 AC vehicle coupler dimensional compatibility
IEC 62196-3 — CCS2 / configuration FF DC and AC/DC couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — conductive EV charging general requirements

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC couplers and IEC 62196 Type 2 are not interchangeable because connector gender, pilot signaling, and contact arrangement differ. GB/T DC couplers are physically different from CCS2 and use GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS2 communication stack.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口与IEC 62196 Type 2不能互换，因为接口性别、导引信号和触点排列不同。GB/T直流接口与CCS2在物理结构上不同，并采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非CCS2通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口與IEC 62196 Type 2不能互換，因為接口性別、導引信號和觸點排列不同。GB/T直流接口與CCS2在物理結構上不同，並採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非CCS2通訊棧。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to BMS communication

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger needs hardware redesign before it can serve IEC 62196 vehicles in Gambia. Required changes include coupler and cable assembly, locking, pilot signaling, contact temperature evidence, labels, spare parts, and for DC stations a communication-stack move away from GB/T 27930 toward the CCS2 implementation required by the actual vehicle fleet. Adapters should not be treated as a conformity or interoperability substitute.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的充电桩在冈比亚服务IEC 62196车辆前需要硬件重新设计。必要变更包括耦合器和电缆组件、锁止、导引信号、触点温升证据、标签、备件，以及直流站从GB/T 27930转向实际车辆队列所需CCS2实现的通信栈。转接器不应被视为合规或互操作替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的充電樁在甘比亞服務IEC 62196車輛前需要硬體重新設計。必要變更包括耦合器和電纜組件、鎖止、導引信號、觸點溫升證據、標籤、備件，以及直流站從GB/T 27930轉向實際車輛隊列所需CCS2實現的通訊棧。轉接器不應被視為合規或互操作替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is mandatory when required by the project, donor, site owner, fleet, PURA/NAWEC condition, or TGSB conformity route; no national connector rule was publicly confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is physical hardware and protocol work. For Gambia projects specifying IEC infrastructure, GB/T 20234 connectors must be replaced with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 designs before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是物理硬件和协议工作。对于指定IEC基础设施的冈比亚项目，GB/T 20234接口必须在出货前改为IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是物理硬體和協議工作。對於指定IEC基礎設施的甘比亞項目，GB/T 20234接口必須在出貨前改為IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2設計。
